name: Crab Rangoon#1
recipeIngredient: 1 can Or small package frozen crabmeat, or fresh!
recipeInstructions:
1. Add a dollop of sour cream to the mixture of cheese and cream until mayonnaise consistency.
2. Stir in the drained crab meat and garlic powder.
3. Place a spoonful of the filling on a wonton skin and wrap like an egg roll.
4. Seal the edge with beaten egg white.
5. Deep fry until golden, and serve hot!
